description: In this live session, the hosts introduce the second part of Crypto Fundamentals, covering topics such as the definition of cryptocurrency, the difference between tokens and coins, and an overview of centralized versus decentralized exchanges. They also engage with viewers, encouraging them to share their locations and experiences.
topic_summary: The session focuses on understanding cryptocurrency, including definitions, types, and the distinction between centralized and decentralized exchanges. It aims to deepen knowledge on crypto wallets and exchange mechanisms, with increased difficulty in questions compared to the previous session. [t=0:16] [t=89:98] [t=221:02]
